nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.description: A sub section for describing any elemental, molecular or single phase pure substance.

allOf.$comment: ArchiveSection :Base class for sections in a NOMAD archive. Provides a framework for custom section normalization via the `normalize` function.

name.description: A short name for the substance.

molecular_mass.description:
The mass of the most likely isotopic composition for a single molecule,
corresponding to the most intense ion/molecule peak in a mass spectrum.

molar_mass.description:
The molar mass is the sum of all atomic masses of the constituent atoms in a
compound, measured in g/mol. In the absence of explicit isotope labelling,
averaged natural abundance is assumed. If an atom bears an explicit isotope label,
100%% isotopic purity is assumed at this location.

monoisotopic_mass.description:
The mass of a molecule, calculated using the mass of the most abundant isotope of
each element.

ReadableIdentifiers :A base section that can be used to generate readable IDs. If the `owner`, `short_name`, `institute`, and `datetime`
quantities are provided, the lab_id will be automatically created as a combination
of these four quantities.

nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.title: ReadableIdentifiers
nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.description:
A base section that can be used to generate readable IDs. If the `owner`, `short_name`, `institute`, and `datetime`
quantities are provided, the lab_id will be automatically created as a combination
of these four quantities.

allOf.$comment: ArchiveSection :Base class for sections in a NOMAD archive. Provides a framework for custom section normalization via the `normalize` function.

institute.description: Alias/short name of the home institute of the owner, i.e. *HZB*.

owner.description:
Alias for the owner of the identified thing. This should be unique within the
institute.

datetime.description:
A datetime associated with the identified thing. In case of an `Activity`, this
should be the starting time and, in case of an `Entity`, the creation time.

short_name.description:
A short name of the the identified thing (e.g. the identifier scribed on the
sample, the process number, or machine name), e.g. 4001-8, YAG-2-34.
This is to be managed and decided internally by the labs, although we recommend
to avoid the following characters in it: "_", "/", "\" and ".".

lab_id.description:
Full readable id. Ideally a human readable id convention, which is simple,
understandable and still have chances of becoming unique.
If the `owner`, `short_name`, `ìnstitute`, and `datetime` are provided, this will
be formed automatically by joining these components by an underscore (_).
Spaces in any of the individual components will be replaced with hyphens (-).
An example would be hzb_oah_20200602_4001-08.

nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.title: CompositeSystem
nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.description: A base section for a material systems composed of components. Each component of the composite system is of a (sub)type of `System`.

allOf.$comment: System :A base section for any system of materials which is investigated or used to construct other systems.

components.description:
A list of all the components of the composite system containing a name, reference
to the system section and mass of that component.

nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.title: Component
nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.description: A section for describing a component and its role in a composite system.

allOf.$comment: ArchiveSection :Base class for sections in a NOMAD archive. Provides a framework for custom section normalization via the `normalize` function.

name.description: A short name for the component.

mass_fraction.description: The mass fraction of the component in the composite system.

nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.title: System
nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.description: A base section for any system of materials which is investigated or used to construct other systems.

allOf.$comment: Entity :An object that persists, endures, or continues to exist through time while maintaining its identity.

elemental_composition.description:
A list of all the elements found in the system together and their respective
atomic fraction within the system.

nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.title: ElementalComposition
nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.description: A section for describing the elemental composition of a system, i.e. the element and its atomic fraction.

allOf.$comment: ArchiveSection :Base class for sections in a NOMAD archive. Provides a framework for custom section normalization via the `normalize` function.

element.description: The symbol of the element, e.g. 'Pb'.

atomic_fraction.description:
The atomic fraction of the element in the system it is contained within.
Per definition a positive value less than or equal to 1.

mass_fraction.description:
The mass fraction of the element in the system it is contained within.
Per definition a positive value less than or equal to 1.

nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.title: Entity
nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.description: An object that persists, endures, or continues to exist through time while maintaining its identity.

allOf.$comment:
BaseSection :A generic abstract base section that provides a few commonly used properties. If you inherit from this section, but do not need some quantities, list those
quantities in the `eln.hide` annotation of your inheriting section definition.

Besides predefining some quantities, these base sections will add some metadata
to NOMAD's search. A particular example are `tags`, if you define a string
or enum quantity in your sections named `tags`, its values will be searchable.

nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.title: BaseSection
nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.description:
A generic abstract base section that provides a few commonly used properties. If you inherit from this section, but do not need some quantities, list those
quantities in the `eln.hide` annotation of your inheriting section definition.

Besides predefining some quantities, these base sections will add some metadata
to NOMAD's search. A particular example are `tags`, if you define a string
or enum quantity in your sections named `tags`, its values will be searchable.

allOf.$comment: ArchiveSection :Base class for sections in a NOMAD archive. Provides a framework for custom section normalization via the `normalize` function.

name.description: A short human readable and descriptive name.

datetime.description: The date and time associated with this section.

lab_id.description:
An ID string that is unique at least for the lab that produced this
data.

description.description: Any information that cannot be captured in the other fields.

allOf.$comment: BaseProcess :P is a process = Def. p is an occurrent that has temporal proper parts and for some time t, p s-depends_on some material entity at t. (axiom label in BFO2 Reference: [083-003])
ArchiveSection :Base class for sections in a NOMAD archive. Provides a framework for custom section normalization via the `normalize` function.

layer_material_name.description: The chemical formula using common abreviations. This will be used to set layer material, if not set, e.g. MAPbI3.

layer_material.description: The chemical formula of the layer. This will be used directly and indirectly in the search. The formula will be used itself as well as the extracted chemical elements.

layer_thickness.description: The thickness of the sample, either measured or assumed.

layer_transmission.description: Percentage of light that gets transmitted through the layer.

layer_morphology.description: A description of the morphology of the film

layer_chemical_id.description: Identifier of the product used for creating the layerin case it is purchased from supplier

baseclasses.BaseProcess.title: BaseProcess
baseclasses.BaseProcess.description: P is a process = Def. p is an occurrent that has temporal proper parts and for some time t, p s-depends_on some material entity at t. (axiom label in BFO2 Reference: [083-003])

allOf.$comment:
Process :A planned process which results in physical changes in a specified input material. [ obi : prs obi : mc obi : fg obi : jf obi : bp ]

Synonyms:
 - preparative method
 - sample preparation
 - sample preparative method
 - material transformations
ArchiveSection :Base class for sections in a NOMAD archive. Provides a framework for custom section normalization via the `normalize` function.

nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.title: Process
nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.description:
A planned process which results in physical changes in a specified input material. [ obi : prs obi : mc obi : fg obi : jf obi : bp ]

Synonyms:
 - preparative method
 - sample preparation
 - sample preparative method
 - material transformations

allOf.$comment: Activity :An action that has a temporal extension and for some time depends on some entity.

end_time.description: The date and time when this process was finished.

steps.description: An ordered list of all the dependant steps that make up this activity.

instruments.description: A list of all the instruments and their role in this process.

samples.description: The samples as that have undergone the process.

allOf.$comment: ActivityStep :Any dependant step of an `Activity`.

duration.description: The duration time of the process step.

allOf.$comment: ArchiveSection :Base class for sections in a NOMAD archive. Provides a framework for custom section normalization via the `normalize` function.

name.description: A short and descriptive name for this step.

start_time.description:
Optionally, the starting time of the activity step. If omitted, it is assumed to
follow directly after the previous step.

comment.description: Any additional information about the step not captured by the other fields.

nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.title: InstrumentReference
nomad.datamodel.metainfo.basesections.v1.description: A section used for referencing an Instrument.

allOf.$comment:
BaseSection :A generic abstract base section that provides a few commonly used properties. If you inherit from this section, but do not need some quantities, list those
quantities in the `eln.hide` annotation of your inheriting section definition.

Besides predefining some quantities, these base sections will add some metadata
to NOMAD's search. A particular example are `tags`, if you define a string
or enum quantity in your sections named `tags`, its values will be searchable.

datetime.description: The date and time when this activity was started.

method.description: A short consistent handle for the applied method.

steps.description: An ordered list of all the dependant steps that make up this activity.
